name_en: Top-tier original factory with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original factory with full packaging
My ABCDior four-compartment elephant grey lambskin trellis tote, comes with a customizable wide shoulder strap, 6 badges included, pale gold metal accessories, customizable wide shoulder strap, embellished with Dior badges, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, dimensions 20 x 16.5 x 8cm
